name: Aunt Gisele's Caramel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour a 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1 inch jelly roll pan; set aside.
3. Combine the butter, yolks, sugar, cinnamon, and flour in a bowl until you form a cohesive ball of dough.
4. Spread the dough onto the prepared jelly roll pan and bake for 15 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, cook the almonds mixture (sugar, butter, honey, and milk) stirring occasionally until it is light golden.
6. Remove baked dough from oven; spread the almond mixture over the top.
7. Bake for an additional 15 to 20 minutes until dark golden.
8. Cool completely before cutting into squares or rectangles. Be sure to cut the cookies before they turn too hard.
